abnormal.en: The doctor found nothing abnormal in the test.
abnormal.zh: 醫生在檢查中沒有發現異常。

abolish.en: The country abolished the old law.
abolish.zh: 這個國家廢除了舊法律。

abortion.en: The topic of abortion was debated in class.
abortion.zh: 課堂上辯論了墮胎這個議題。

abrupt.en: The car made an abrupt stop.

abundant.en: The region has abundant water resources.

abuse.en: The law protects children from abuse.
abuse.zh: 法律保護兒童免於受虐。

accelerate.en: The driver accelerated on the highway.
accelerate.zh: 駕駛在高速公路上加速。

accessible.en: The building is accessible to wheelchairs.
accessible.zh: 這棟建築方便輪椅進出。

accommodate.zh: 這個大廳可容納一千人。

accommodation.zh: 這趟旅行的費用包含住宿。

accord.en: Her actions are in accord with her words.
accord.zh: 她的行為和她說的話一致。

acknowledge.zh: 他誠實地承認了自己的錯誤。

acquaint.en: Please acquaint yourself with the rules.

acquisition.en: Language acquisition takes time and practice.
acquisition.zh: 語言的習得需要時間和練習。

activist.en: The activist fought for clean air.
activist.zh: 這位行動者為乾淨的空氣而奮鬥。

acute.en: He felt an acute pain in his stomach.
acute.zh: 他感到胃部劇烈的疼痛。

administration.en: The school administration set new rules.
administration.zh: 學校行政單位訂定了新規則。

administrative.en: She handles administrative tasks in the office.
administrative.zh: 她在辦公室處理行政事務。

administrator.en: The administrator manages the school's records.
administrator.zh: 這位行政人員管理學校的紀錄。

adore.zh: 孩子們很愛他們的奶奶。

adverse.en: The plan failed due to adverse weather.
adverse.zh: 計畫因惡劣的天氣而失敗。

advocate.en: She is an advocate for animal rights.
advocate.zh: 她是動物權利的倡導者。

affection.en: The dog showed great affection for its owner.
affection.zh: 這隻狗對主人表現出深厚的感情。

agenda.en: The first item on the agenda is the budget.

aggression.en: They tried to stop the aggression peacefully.
aggression.zh: 他們試圖和平地阻止侵略。

agony.en: He was in agony after breaking his leg.

agricultural.en: This is a rich agricultural area.

aisle.en: She walked down the aisle of the store.

alcoholic.en: The drink is not alcoholic, so kids can have it.
alcoholic.zh: 這款飲料不含酒精，小孩可以喝。

alien.en: The movie is about an alien from space.
alien.zh: 這部電影是關於一個來自太空的外星人。

allergy.en: He has an allergy to cats.

alliance.en: The two nations formed an alliance.
alliance.zh: 這兩個國家結成了同盟。

allocate.en: We need to allocate time for each task.
allocate.zh: 我們需要為每項任務分配時間。

ally.en: The two countries were allies in the war.
ally.zh: 這兩個國家在戰爭中是盟友。

alter.en: He altered his plan after the news.
alter.zh: 聽到消息後他改變了計畫。

alternate.en: We took an alternate route to avoid traffic.
alternate.zh: 我們走了另一條路以避開車潮。

amend.en: They amended the rule to make it fair.
amend.zh: 他們修改了規則使它更公平。

ample.en: There is ample space for everyone.
ample.zh: 有足夠的空間給每個人。

analyst.en: The analyst studied the company's data.
analyst.zh: 分析師研究了公司的數據。

anonymous.en: The gift came from an anonymous donor.
anonymous.zh: 這份禮物來自一位匿名的捐贈者。

anticipate.zh: 我們預料這會是個忙碌的週末。

applause.zh: 歌手獲得了熱烈的掌聲。

appliance.en: A fridge is a kitchen appliance.

apt.en: He is apt to forget his keys.

architect.en: The architect designed a modern house.
architect.zh: 建築師設計了一棟現代的房子。

architecture.en: I admire the architecture of old temples.

arena.en: Thousands watched the game in the arena.
arena.zh: 成千上萬人在競技場觀看比賽。

arouse.en: The strange noise aroused our curiosity.
arouse.zh: 那奇怪的聲音引起了我們的好奇。

array.en: The store offers a wide array of toys.
array.zh: 這家店提供各式各樣的玩具。

arrogant.zh: 他傲慢的態度惹惱了大家。

articulate.zh: 她把想法表達得很清楚。

ass.en: An ass is another name for a donkey.

assault.en: The man was arrested for assault.
assault.zh: 那名男子因攻擊他人而被捕。

assert.en: She asserted that she was right.

assess.en: The teacher will assess our projects.
assess.zh: 老師將評量我們的專題。

asset.zh: 誠實是一項可貴的資產。

assumption.zh: 別在沒有證據時妄下假設。

astonish.en: The magic trick astonished the crowd.

athletics.en: She is good at athletics, especially running.
athletics.zh: 她擅長田徑，尤其是跑步。

attendance.en: Attendance at the meeting was high.
attendance.zh: 這場會議的出席率很高。

attic.en: Old toys are stored in the attic.

attorney.en: The attorney defended her client well.
attorney.zh: 律師為她的當事人辯護得很好。

attribute.en: She attributes her success to hard work.

auction.en: The painting was sold at an auction.
auction.zh: 這幅畫在拍賣會上賣出。

authorize.en: Only the manager can authorize a refund.
authorize.zh: 只有經理可以批准退款。

autonomy.en: The region was given more autonomy.
autonomy.zh: 這個地區獲得了更多的自治權。

awe.en: We stood in awe of the giant waterfall.
awe.zh: 我們敬畏地望著那道巨大的瀑布。

backyard.en: The kids played in the backyard.

ballot.en: Each voter placed a ballot in the box.
ballot.zh: 每位選民把選票投入箱中。

ban.en: The park has a ban on littering.
ban.zh: 這座公園禁止亂丟垃圾。

banner.en: They hung a welcome banner over the door.
banner.zh: 他們在門上掛了一條歡迎布條。

barren.en: Nothing grows in the barren land.
barren.zh: 這片貧瘠的土地上什麼都長不出來。

batch.en: She baked a fresh batch of cookies.
batch.zh: 她烤了一批新鮮的餅乾。

behalf.en: She spoke on behalf of the whole class.

belongings.en: Please keep your belongings with you.

beloved.en: The beloved teacher retired this year.
beloved.zh: 這位深受愛戴的老師今年退休了。

beneficial.en: Exercise is beneficial to your health.

betray.en: He would never betray a friend.

beware.en: Beware of the dog at the gate.

bias.en: A good judge has no bias.

bid.en: He made a high bid at the auction.
bid.zh: 他在拍賣會上出了高價。

biological.en: We studied biological changes in plants.
biological.zh: 我們研究了植物的生物變化。

bizarre.en: She told a bizarre story about a ghost.
bizarre.zh: 她講了一個關於鬼的怪異故事。

blast.en: The blast from the firework was loud.

blur.en: Without my glasses, the words are a blur.
blur.zh: 沒戴眼鏡，字都變得模糊。

blush.en: She began to blush when praised.

bodyguard.en: The star has a tall bodyguard.
bodyguard.zh: 這位明星有個高大的保鑣。

bolt.en: He tightened the bolt with a tool.

bonus.en: She got a year-end bonus at work.
bonus.zh: 她在工作上拿到了年終獎金。

boom.en: The town saw an economic boom.
boom.zh: 這個城鎮經歷了經濟繁榮。

boost.en: Winning the game boosted their confidence.
boost.zh: 贏得比賽提升了他們的信心。

booth.en: We bought tickets at the booth.

boredom.en: She read a book to escape boredom.

bound.en: The river forms the bound of the farm.
bound.zh: 這條河形成了農場的邊界。

boundary.en: The fence marks the boundary of the yard.
boundary.zh: 這道籬笆標示出院子的邊界。

boxer.en: The boxer trained hard for the match.
boxer.zh: 拳擊手為比賽努力訓練。

breakthrough.en: The new medicine was a major breakthrough.
breakthrough.zh: 這款新藥是個重大的突破。

briefcase.en: He carried a leather briefcase to work.
briefcase.zh: 他帶著皮製公事包上班。

bronze.en: She won a bronze medal in swimming.
bronze.zh: 她在游泳項目贏得銅牌。

browse.en: I like to browse books at the store.
browse.zh: 我喜歡在書店隨意翻書。

bruise.en: He got a bruise on his arm from the fall.

bulk.en: The bulk of the work is already done.
bulk.zh: 大部分的工作已經完成了。

bully.en: We must not let anyone bully others.
bully.zh: 我們不能讓任何人霸凌別人。

bureau.en: She works at the weather bureau.

bureaucracy.en: Too much bureaucracy slows things down.
bureaucracy.zh: 過多的官僚程序會拖慢進度。

burial.en: The burial took place at the cemetery.

butcher.en: The butcher cut the meat into pieces.

canal.en: Boats travel through the city's canals.
canal.zh: 船隻穿行於城市的運河。

canvas.en: The artist painted on a large canvas.
canvas.zh: 畫家在一塊大畫布上作畫。

capability.en: She has the capability to lead the team.
capability.zh: 她有能力帶領這個團隊。

carbon.zh: 汽車排放有害的碳氣體。

carnival.en: The town held a colorful carnival.
carnival.zh: 這個城鎮舉辦了一場繽紛的嘉年華。

casino.en: Gambling at a casino can be risky.
casino.zh: 在賭場賭博可能很危險。

cathedral.en: The old cathedral has tall windows.
cathedral.zh: 這座古老的大教堂有高大的窗戶。

caution.en: Handle the hot pan with caution.

cautious.en: She is cautious when crossing the street.

cemetery.en: Flowers were placed in the cemetery.

certainty.en: There is no certainty about the weather.
certainty.zh: 天氣沒有什麼好確定的。

certificate.en: She received a certificate for the course.
certificate.zh: 她拿到了這門課程的結業證書。

chaos.en: The room was in complete chaos.

chapel.en: They prayed quietly in the small chapel.
chapel.zh: 他們在小教堂裡安靜地禱告。

chef.en: The chef prepared a delicious meal.
chef.zh: 主廚準備了一頓美味的餐點。

choir.en: She sings in the school choir.

chord.en: He played a soft chord on the guitar.
chord.zh: 他在吉他上彈了一個柔和的和弦。

chore.en: Washing dishes is a daily chore.

chronic.en: He suffers from chronic back pain.

chubby.en: The baby has chubby little cheeks.
chubby.zh: 寶寶有圓圓胖胖的小臉頰。

chunk.en: She cut a big chunk of cheese.

cite.en: Please cite the source of your information.

citizenship.en: He applied for citizenship in his new country.
citizenship.zh: 他在新國家申請公民身分。

clarity.en: She explained the rule with clarity.
clarity.zh: 她把規則解釋得很清楚。

clause.en: Read every clause of the contract.
clause.zh: 把合約的每一條款都讀過。

cling.en: The child clung to her mother's hand.
cling.zh: 孩子緊緊抓著媽媽的手。

clinical.en: The new drug passed its clinical test.
clinical.zh: 這款新藥通過了臨床測試。

cluster.en: A cluster of stars shone in the sky.
cluster.zh: 一團星星在天空中閃耀。

cocaine.en: Cocaine is a dangerous and illegal drug.
cocaine.zh: 古柯鹼是一種危險的非法毒品。

coffin.en: The coffin was made of dark wood.
coffin.zh: 這口棺材是用深色的木頭做的。

coherent.en: She gave a clear and coherent answer.
coherent.zh: 她給了一個清楚且有條理的回答。

coincidence.en: Meeting you here is a happy coincidence.
coincidence.zh: 在這裡遇到你真是個美好的巧合。

collaboration.en: The book was a collaboration of two writers.
collaboration.zh: 這本書是兩位作家合作的成果。

collective.en: It was a collective effort by the whole team.
collective.zh: 這是整個團隊共同的努力。

collector.en: He is a collector of old stamps.

colonial.en: The town has many colonial buildings.
colonial.zh: 這個城鎮有許多殖民時期的建築。

columnist-n-combat.en: The columnist wrote about city life.
columnist-n-combat.zh: 這位專欄作家寫城市生活。

comedian.en: The comedian made the whole room laugh.
comedian.zh: 這位喜劇演員逗得全場大笑。

commentary.en: He gave a lively commentary on the game.
commentary.zh: 他對比賽做了生動的評論。

commentator.zh: 球評描述了每一個動作。

commission.en: The salesman earns a commission on each sale.
commission.zh: 業務員每筆銷售可賺取佣金。

commitment.zh: 學語言需要投入與堅持。

commodity.zh: 稻米是一項重要的商品。

communism.en: Students studied the idea of communism.
communism.zh: 學生研究了共產主義的概念。

communist.en: He read about a communist country in history.
communist.zh: 他在歷史課讀到一個共產國家。

commute.en: She commutes to work by train.

commuter.en: The train was full of tired commuters.
commuter.zh: 火車上擠滿了疲憊的通勤族。

compact.en: The small car is compact and easy to park.
compact.zh: 這輛小車很精巧，容易停車。

comparable.en: The two phones are comparable in price.

compassion.en: She treats the sick with compassion.
